/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/engine.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/GameUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/World.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/FortniteWorld.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/WorldGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/Entry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/Chest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/Item.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/Weapon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/ItemDatabase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/LootPool.cpp.o -o engine
